title: rubus × idaeoides
intro: Rubus × idaeoides, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, characterized by its edible red fruits. The plant is said to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help protect against cell damage and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Rubus × idaeoides include its potential to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and address specific health issues.
